free_text: Elastic scattering and radiative capture of
protons by 14N
Eng.trans.of IZV,23,839,1959
SD: Ref. BAS,23,833,1959 was added. Title
and authors were corrected following BAS,23,833.
0.5 mm crystal of CsI(Tl) and photomultiplier
tube was used.
Effective target thickness did not exceed 12 mm at a
pressure of 5 millimeters of mercury.
Statistical error
Absolute cross section error was 5-6%.
SD: Value in ERR-DIG was changed.
Accuracy of data presentation was changed.
30*20 mm crystal of CsJ(Tl) and photomultiplier
tube was used.
Target was manufactured by implantation of 14N ions
with the energy of 20 keV into tantalum backing (0.5 mm
thickness)
SD: Accuracy of data presentation changed.
30*20 mm crystal of CsJ(Tl) and photomultiplier
tube was used.
Target was manufactured by implantation of 14N ions
with the energy of 20 keV into tantalum backing (0.5 mm
thickness)
No information on source of uncertainties
Data from text pp. 843, 844 of IZV,23,839,1959
